data.title: Netskope, Inc.: Strong Market Position and Growth Potential Justify Buy Rating
data.description:
Analyst Shrenik Kothari of Robert W. Baird maintained a Buy rating on Netskope, Inc., retaining the price target of $27.00.

TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Shrenik Kothari has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors that highlight Netskope, Inc.’s strong market position and growth potential. The company is experiencing increased demand for its AI-driven SASE and DLP security solutions, which are gaining traction against traditional vendors. This is supported by positive channel and partner feedback, indicating above-plan execution and competitive wins in key markets.
Despite the stock’s recent underperformance, which is attributed more to general IPO market conditions than company-specific issues, Netskope’s valuation remains attractive. The company’s differentiated architecture, strong ARR visibility, and solid execution provide a promising outlook. Additionally, the expanding SASE and Zero Trust markets present significant growth opportunities, reinforcing the Buy rating as Netskope continues to be a pivotal player in these areas.

In another report released yesterday, TD Cowen also reiterated a Buy rating on the stock with a $30.00 price target.

data.title: Positive Outlook for Oracle Driven by OCI Growth and Strategic Investments
data.description:
In a report released yesterday, Derrick Wood from TD Cowen reiterated a Buy rating on Oracle, with a price target of $400.00.

TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Derrick Wood’s rating is based on several key factors that suggest a positive outlook for Oracle’s stock. Firstly, the anticipated acceleration in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) growth is expected to reverse recent negative sentiment. This growth is projected to be bolstered by the Abilene project coming online, which is expected to significantly increase capacity and drive OCI expansion.
Additionally, Derrick Wood highlights that Oracle’s capital expenditure and financing needs may be less demanding than previously thought, which could alleviate investor concerns. The valuation of Oracle’s stock is considered to be at a low point, providing potential for significant upside. Furthermore, strong enterprise checks indicate robust growth in Oracle’s cloud services and AI workloads, supporting the optimistic forecast for OCI growth and overall company performance.

In another report released yesterday, Wells Fargo also initiated coverage with a Buy rating on the stock with a $280.00 price target.
